description: The main window, the app-defined commands (health / scan_inventory / market / top_sellables / tray / update check-install-restart, plus probe-only), and the window controls the tray + close-to-tray lifecycle drives (close/hide/show/is-visible). App-defined and Rust-fired commands (incl. the Rust-side notification, and the updater plugin — driven from Rust only, so no updater:* ACL) need no ACL entry in Tauri v2; core:default covers the window basics and the event listen the update-available banner uses.
